info.title: Tessera API
info.description: Context & Memory OS for AI coding agents — search, compile_context, get_effects, and versioned memory.

get.description: Readiness probe — 503 until dependencies are reachable.

get.summary: The resolved identity, tenant, and effective permissions for the caller.
The RBAC catalog: roles, permissions, and role → permissions.
List the calling tenant's API tokens (no secrets).

post.summary: Issue a scoped API token (the secret is returned once).

delete.summary: Revoke an API token by id.

post.summary: Hybrid search across code, memory, and the knowledge graph.

include.description: Extras to attach per hit. Ask only for what you will use — each costs tokens.

node.description: Attach the graph node to pass to `GET /v1/effects`, when the hit has one (+135).

label.description: Human-readable title — a source path, a memory title, or a symbol name.

matches.description: Spans of `text` that matched a query term.

truncatedEnd.description: `text` stops before the end of the document.

node.description: The graph node this hit is, when it has one — pass it to `GET /v1/effects` to see what a change here would affect. Absent for items with no node (e.g. a memory).

post.summary: Compile context for a task within a token budget (capped to the plan).

task.description: The task context is being compiled for.

budget.description: Max tokens the package may occupy.

get.summary: What is affected if a node changes (ranked, path-bearing).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Kind of the node whose dependents to find.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Natural key of the node (e.g. a file path or symbol).

post.summary: Assert an effect-link: changing `from` may require reviewing `to`.

get.summary: A bounded subgraph of the knowledge graph for visualization.
Get the current version of a memory lineage.

patch.summary: Edit a memory (appends a superseding version).

get.summary: Every version of a memory lineage, oldest first.

post.summary: Register a source (filesystem or git) for ingestion.
Scan a source (incremental + idempotent); returns what changed.

get.summary: A source's most recent scan status.
The workspace summary: indexed documents, memories, graph size, sources, last scan.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream of live updates — ingest progress and new memories (FR-38).

get.summary: List subscription plans and their entitlements.

post.summary: Start a hosted checkout for a paid plan.

get.summary: Query this tenant's audit trail (admin only).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque forward cursor from a prior page.

get.summary: The deployment's effective memory retention policy (empty rules ⇒ retention off).

maxAgeMs.description: Expire a lineage whose current version is older than this.

maxSupersededVersions.description: Keep at most this many superseded versions per lineage.

maxSupersededAgeMs.description: Prune superseded versions older than this.

post.summary: Apply the retention policy to the calling tenant's memories; returns what was pruned.

expiredLineages.description: Whole lineages deleted by an age-based expiry.

get.summary: Export everything held for the calling tenant (memories, graph, sources, audit).

exportedAt.description: ISO-8601 time the bundle was assembled.

memories.description: Every memory version across every lineage.

post.summary: Erase the calling tenant's data plane (the audit trail is retained).
